title: allium roseum subsp. odoratissimum
intro: Allium roseum subsp. odoratissimum, also known as the fragrant garlic or scented garlic, is a subspecies of the Allium roseum plant, a type of flowering plant in the onion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high sulfur content. The health benefits of Allium roseum subsp. odoratissimum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
